valid.name: complex-select-with-limit
valid.code:
SELECT u.id, u.name, p.title
FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.id = p.user_id
WHERE
    u.active = true
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

valid.name: insert-values-not-flagged
valid.code:
-- Regression for #159: INSERT ... VALUES (...) is rewritten by
-- libpg-query into a SelectStmt with `valuesLists`, but LIMIT has no
-- meaning there.
INSERT INTO t (id, name) VALUES
  (1, 'alpha'),
  (2, 'beta');

valid.name: select-with-limit-and-offset
valid.code: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE active = true LIMIT 20 OFFSET 10;

invalid.name: complex-select-without-limit
invalid.code:
SELECT u.id, u.name, p.title
FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.id = p.user_id
WHERE
    u.active = true
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC;

errors.message: SELECT statement should include a LIMIT clause to prevent excessive data retrieval
SELECT statement should include a LIMIT clause to prevent excessive data retrieval
